exploration.title: Local-First Voice & Microphone Capability
openQuestions: Spike outcome: does push-to-talk dictation (local Moonshine) + read-aloud (local Kokoro) in the professional-desktop composer prove out the UX and the webview/worker hard bits (secure context, COOP/COEP, getUserMedia, local model load)?
After the spike: graduate which goal(s) from the 7-packet MAP, and reshape BRIEF accordingly.
